generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values our nation's security, I'm glad to see our leaders reinforcing NATO commitments. It's crucial we maintain strong alliances to deter aggression and protect our way of life. Some worry about burden-sharing, but our contributions ensure our allies stand with us when it matters most. #StrongAlliances #NationalSecurityFirst
